\tzpentry{ID3317}{Resonance Kaluza-Klein Eigenvalue}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3317 introduces Resonance Kaluza-Klein Eigenvalue as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} f_ \text{resonance} = f_0 \sqrt{1 + n^2 \left( \frac{ \lambda_ \text{acoustic}}{ \lambda_ \text{KK}} \right)^2} \end{equation}
